##RRUFFID=R120005

##LOCALITY=Mount Malosa, Zomba District, Malawi
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Marcus Origlieri
##DESCRIPTION=Tan colored euhedral crystals associated with black arfvedsonite

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
